debug_info.goal:
R : Type u_1
A : Type u_2
C : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : CommSemiring R
inst✝⁴ : CommSemiring A
inst✝³ : CommSemiring C
inst✝² : HopfAlgebra R A
inst✝¹ : HopfAlgebra R C
inst✝ : IsCocomm R C
f : C →ₐc[R] A
⊢ f⁻¹ * f = 1

proof:
by
  ext c
  exact AlgHom.ext_iff.1 (AlgHom.inv_convMul_cancel f) c
failed_attempts:
by
  apply AlgHom.toLinearMap_injective
  rw [AlgHom.toLinearMap_convMul, AlgHom.toLinearMap_convOne]
  ext; simp [convMul_def, ← comp_assoc, ← map_comp_comul f, ← convMul_def, LinearMap.antipode_mul_id, convOne_def]

by
  ext c; simp [convMul_apply, ← map_comul, sum_antipode_mul_eq_algebraMap_counit, map_counit, AlgHom.convOne_apply]

by
  ext c
  simp [convMul_apply, ← map_comul, ← LinearMap.convMul_apply, LinearMap.antipode_mul_id, convOne_apply]

by
  ext c
  simp [inv_apply, convMul_apply, ← map_comp_comul f, LinearMap.antipode_mul_id, map_counit, convOne_apply]

by
  ext c
  simp only [inv_apply, convMul_apply, ← map_sum, ← map_comul, ← convMul_apply,
    HopfAlgebra.toLinearMap_antipodeAlgHom, LinearMap.antipode_mul_id, convOne_apply]

by
  ext c
  simp [convMul_apply, ← map_comul, ← LinearMap.convMul_apply, map_counit, convOne_apply]

by
  ext; simp [convMul_apply, ← map_comul, ← convMul_apply, LinearMap.antipode_mul_id, map_counit, convOne_apply]
BialgHom.ext fun c => congr_fun (AlgHom.inv_convMul_cancel f) c
successful_attempts:
by
  ext c
  exact AlgHom.ext_iff.1 (AlgHom.inv_convMul_cancel f) c
ext fun c ↦ AlgHom.congr_fun (AlgHom.inv_convMul_cancel f) c

by
  ext c
  exact congr($(AlgHom.inv_convMul_cancel f) c)
BialgHom.ext fun c ↦ AlgHom.congr_fun (AlgHom.inv_convMul_cancel f) c
BialgHom.ext fun c => AlgHom.congr_fun (AlgHom.inv_convMul_cancel f) c

by
  ext c
  exact AlgHom.ext_iff.1 (AlgHom.inv_convMul_cancel f) c
